nodes.name: 15-Minute Schedule
nodes.notes: Fires every 15 minutes. Change to '*/5 * * * *' for 5-minute intervals (higher API costs) or '0 * * * *' for hourly (lower costs).

nodes.name: Pull HubSpot Pipeline
nodes.notes: Fetches all open deals from HubSpot. Update the filter to match your pipeline stages.

nodes.name: Pull GA4 Metrics
nodes.notes: Replace REPLACE_GA4_PROPERTY_ID with your actual GA4 property ID. Use a Google service account for production auth.

nodes.name: Pull Revenue Data
nodes.notes: Replace with your preferred revenue source (Stripe, Shopify, Chargebee). This pulls today's charges from Stripe.

nodes.name: Merge All Sources
nodes.notes: Combines all three API responses into one items array. Uses combineAll mode so all data is available downstream.

nodes.name: Aggregate Metrics
nodes.notes: Edit the field extraction logic here to match your actual API response structures. Each source may return data differently.

nodes.name: Update Dashboard Sheet
nodes.notes: Replace the Sheet ID. Create a sheet named 'Dashboard Data' with a row where row_id='LIVE'. Connect Looker Studio to this sheet.

nodes.name: Data Quality Check
nodes.notes: Only fires a Slack alert if one or more data sources returned an error. Normal runs complete silently.

parameters.content:
## 18 — Real-time Dashboard Updater

**What this workflow does:**
Every 15 minutes: pulls data from HubSpot + GA4 + Stripe in parallel, aggregates into a single object, updates a Google Sheet, and alerts Slack if any source fails.

**Before you use this:**
1. Replace REPLACE_GA4_PROPERTY_ID with your actual GA4 property ID
2. Replace all credential IDs
3. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your Sheet ID
4. Create a 'Dashboard Data' sheet with these columns: last_updated, open_deals, pipeline_value, sessions_today, conversions_today, bounce_rate_pct, new_users_today, revenue_today, transactions_today
5. Add a row with row_id='LIVE' — this is the row that gets updated each run
6. Connect Looker Studio or Metabase to this Google Sheet

**Swap out Stripe** for Shopify, Chargebee, or any revenue API by replacing the Pull Revenue Data node.
